description: Hardcoded constants and defaults per ASCE 7-16 — these values are never asked of the user

Kd.description: Wind directionality factor for buildings (MWFRS and C&C)

Ke.note: Default assumption; conservative for all elevations

G.note: Valid when natural frequency >= 1 Hz. Conservative assumption applied for all structures in this tool.

GCpi_enclosed.description: Internal pressure coefficient for enclosed buildings
GCpi_enclosed.note: Both + and - cases must be checked. All buildings assumed fully enclosed.

velocity_pressure_coefficient.description: Constant in velocity pressure equation (units: lb/ft²)
velocity_pressure_coefficient.note: Based on standard air density at sea level

velocity_pressure_equation.simplified_from: qz = 0.00256 * Kz * Kzt * Ke * Kd * V^2
velocity_pressure_equation.simplification_note: Ke = 1.0 assumed, drops out of equation

variables.Kz: Velocity pressure exposure coefficient at height z — from Table 26.10-1
variables.Kzt: Topographic factor — from Fig. 26.8-1 (default 1.0 if no topo feature)
variables.V: Basic wind speed (mph) — from JSON wind speed lookup

design_wind_pressure_equation_MWFRS.formula: p = q * G * Cp - qi * GCpi

surface_rules.windward_wall: q = qz (varies with height), qi = qh

design_wind_pressure_equation_MWFRS.GCpi_note: Evaluate both +0.18 and -0.18 — worst case governs per surface

minimum_wind_loads.note: Calculated pressures must meet or exceed these minimums
